message:
test(coverage): add integration tests for undo and outcome commands

undo.ts: 2.30% → 70.71% coverage
- Add 11 integration tests calling undoCommand directly
- Tests cover un-deprecate, undo-feedback, hard-delete flows
- Tests cover error handling and dry-run modes

outcome.ts: 35.08% → 69.01% coverage
- Add 16 tests for outcomeCommand input validation
- Add tests for applyOutcomeLogCommand
- Tests cover all input validation error paths
